Description: Word-level event table with timing, lexical labels, POS tags, and mapping fields for separately stored language-model features.
RowDefinition: One row represents one spoken word token aligned to the run timeline.

onset.Description: Word onset time relative to run onset.

word.Description: Surface-form token as represented in the annotation source.

normalized_word.Description: Normalized token used for downstream lexical or language-model mapping.

word_index.Description: One-based word index within speaker stream or source transcript, depending on the documented method.

pos.Description: Part-of-speech tag for the word token. POS is documented here rather than as a standalone derivative.
pos.Levels: Document the tagset used by the generator.

surprisal.Description: Optional scalar surprisal value associated with the token.

entropy.Description: Optional predictive entropy value associated with the token.

lm_token_id.Description: Stable token identifier used to join this row to separately stored language-model vectors or scalar outputs.

lm_vector_row.Description: Row index into a separate array file if high-dimensional language-model vectors are released.

alignment_status.Description: Status flag describing whether the token was aligned and mapped successfully.

source_interval_id.Description: Identifier from the source annotation tier or transcript alignment.

Source.AnnotationSource: Forced alignment plus transcript-derived lexical annotation

Method.Algorithm: Word-level alignment and lexical annotation merge

Parameters.EmbeddingStorageRule: Vectors are stored outside the TSV; this table stores only mapping fields.

Preprocessing: Transcript tokens normalized before lexical merge.
Postprocessing: Rows sorted by onset within run.

Notes: This example intentionally keeps language-model embeddings out of the TSV and stores only mapping fields.
